summary: Tested Photographer Session Manager toggle functionality. The LineupManagerDrawer (surfer's view) toggles work correctly with instant UI feedback and persistence. The PhotographerSessionManager code implementation was verified to be correct but could not be directly tested as all bookings are in 'Pending' status (PhotographerSessionManager only appears for 'Confirmed' bookings).
critical_code_review_comments: PhotographerSessionManager implementation is correct with local state (localSplitMode, localAutoConfirm, localLineupStatus) for instant UI feedback
useEffect properly syncs local state with booking prop changes
onBookingUpdate callback correctly updates both selectedBooking and bookings array in parent component
Toggle handlers use optimistic updates pattern - update local state immediately, then call API, revert on error
context_for_next_testing_agent: The PhotographerSessionManager component can only be tested when there are 'Confirmed' bookings. Currently all bookings are in 'Pending' status. The LineupManagerDrawer (accessed via 'The Crew' option in Scheduled sessions) has similar toggle functionality and was tested successfully.

tests_performed.test: Open to Nearby Surfers toggle updates immediately when clicked
tests_performed.details: Toggle changed from ON (cyan) to OFF (gray) immediately, toast message 'Lineup is now friends-only' appeared

tests_performed.test: Auto-Confirm When Ready toggle updates immediately when clicked
tests_performed.details: Toggle changed from OFF (gray) to ON (green) immediately, toast message 'Lineup will auto-confirm when full!' appeared

tests_performed.test: Toggle states persist after closing and reopening modal
tests_performed.details: After toggling both switches, closing modal, and reopening - states persisted correctly
Code implementation verified: local state for instant feedback, useEffect for sync, onBookingUpdate callback, optimistic updates with error rollback

components_tested.LineupManagerDrawer: Tested via 'The Crew' option in Scheduled sessions - toggles work correctly
components_tested.PhotographerSessionManager: Code reviewed - implementation correct but could not be directly tested (requires Confirmed bookings)

toggle_functionality_verified.instant_feedback: YES - toggles update immediately on click
toggle_functionality_verified.api_call: YES - API calls made after toggle
toggle_functionality_verified.persistence: YES - states persist after modal close/reopen
toggle_functionality_verified.error_handling: Code review confirms rollback on API error
